scene: A friendly cartoon shark and a leafy tree side by side with a big red question mark between them, big black caps OLDER THAN TREES? Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
The cartoon shark swimming with soft motion lines, big black caps 400 MILLION YEARS. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
A single leafy tree with a sprout beside it, big black caps TREES: 350 MILLION. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
A huge ancient shark looking down at a tiny first seedling sprouting from the ground, big black caps ALREADY ANCIENT. Composed tall to fill a vertical 9:16 frame. Crude flat colored doodle, no 3D.
